negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing producer path that captures the first primary cause during payload building and records it into block-build traces.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-metrics defines BlockBuildAttemptTrace.primary_cause and record_block_build_attempt accepts it.
RPC debug structs expose primaryCause, but payload builder has no record_block_build_attempt call or first-cause capture logic.

notes: Confirmed gap; schemas alone are insufficient.
rationale: The primary-cause candidate adds first-cause capture and RPC exposure; later telemetry candidates add cap observations but do not supersede first-cause preservation.
statement: ritual_getBlockBuildTrace includes optional primaryCause data for a build attempt when the builder captures a first demotion or async simulation deadline breach, and later causes do not overwrite the first captured cause.
suggested_falsification_tests: Trigger multiple demotions in one payload build with tracing enabled and assert the RPC primaryCause reports only the first cause.
Trigger scheduled and regular async simulation deadline breaches and assert primaryCause.budgetType is async_sim_deadline with the expected phase or section.
summary: Block-build primary-cause trace preservation is absent as an end-to-end behavior.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Trigger multiple demotions/deadline breaches with trace enabled; current port exposes the field type but no payload-builder producer populates it.
title: Block build traces preserve the first primary cause
